nvfp4Status: ABSENT — the lane brief promised BF16 + fused NVFP4 dequant-GEMM, but this artifact contains ONLY the BF16 Triton GEMM roofline. No NVFP4 dequant-GEMM TFLOPS / %-peak numbers are present in the downloaded blob. Reporting BF16 only; NVFP4 is unverified/missing.
registeredResult: registered x86 GPU result — NVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3, BF16 Triton GEMM. NOTE: lane label says 'x86 H100/A100' but only H100 measurements are present; no A100 roofline in this artifact.
verdict: PARTIAL — BF16 GEMM roofline verified (544.25 TFLOP/s = 55.0% of the 989.5 TFLOP/s H100 BF16 datasheet roofline, correctness PASS @ max_rel_err 4e-4). Promised NVFP4 fused dequant-GEMM and A100 numbers are NOT in the artifact.
